name: Cajun Sauce with Jalapenos
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine onion, green bell pepper, and celery in a bowl.
2. Heat oil in a skillet over medium-low heat.
3. Whisk flour into the oil until smooth.
4. Continue heating and stirring until light brown.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the onion mixture.
6. Stir in cayenne, white pepper, black pepper, bay leaves, jalapeno chile, and garlic.
7. Heat for 2 minutes over medium-high heat.
8. Bring beef stock to a boil in a saucepan over high heat.
9. Reduce heat to moderate and stir in the sauce mixture, one tablespoon at a time, dissolving each addition before adding more.
10. Simmer over moderate heat for 15 minutes or until reduced to about 3-1/2 cups.
11. Serve hot with beef.
